answer:
To find the implied total value of Latapack-Ball, note that Ball paid $46.2 million for an additional 10.1% economic interest, increasing its stake to 60.1%. This implies that 10.1% of the joint venture's total value is $46.2 million. Thus, the total value is $46.2 million divided by 0.101, which equals approximately $457.43 million.

\boxed{457.43}
